summary: Iteration 7 testing complete. Backend: 18/18 NEW iter7 tests PASS (100%) covering Admin 2FA login flow (challenge issue, wrong password 401, wrong code 401, used code 400, expired code 400, max attempts 429, unknown challenge 404, valid code returns JWT), self-service /admin/account GET + PATCH (wrong current_password 401, change recovery_email persisted, no-changes 400, unauth 401), and public regression (POST /api/contact, /api/quote, /api/bookings + /api/payments/checkout returning Stripe URL, /api/options, /api/places/autocomplete with >=3 predictions for 'San Fr'). Used the 2FA programmatic-bypass recipe from /app/memory/test_credentials.md (insert challenge into db.admin_2fa_challenges with bcrypt hash of '123456' then verify-2fa) — works exactly as documented. Frontend: all data-testids found and verified — footer-address-1 shows '501 Broadway, #251 Millbrae, CA 94030'; contact-info-area shows the same HQ address; old 'San Ramon' fully removed; 'Burlingame' only appears in the unrelated 'Cities Served' service-area list (intentional, not the HQ). booking-email has type=email + pattern '^[^\s@]+@[^\s@]+\.[^\s@]{2,}$' rejecting 'foo' and 'foo@bar' but accepting 'good@example.com'; 'Double-check your email' helper text present. stripe-badge renders with lock icon + 'Secure payment via' + Stripe wordmark. booking-service-type opens with all 7 services and SelectContent has z-index:100 (overlays vehicle cards correctly). booking-time opens correctly. Google Places autocomplete returns 5 predictions for 'San Fr' inside booking-pickup-dropdown. /admin/login UI step 1 → 2 transitions correctly: 'Continue' fires POST /api/admin/login, toast 'Code sent to a***n@turonlimo.com' shows, step 2 displays masked email, admin-2fa-code input, 'Verify & Sign In' button, and 'Resend code' link. AdminDashboard tab-account renders all 6 testid'd inputs (account-email, account-recovery-email, account-new-password, account-confirm-password, account-current-password, account-save) inside account-form, with current values pre-populated.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py:465-506 admin_login correctly returns 401 BEFORE creating any 2FA challenge (no challenge leakage on bad password) — verified in test_login_wrong_password_401.

server.py:509-540 admin_verify_2fa increments attempts on bad code, marks 'used' on success, and properly rejects used/expired/maxed challenges with the right status codes (401/400/400/429). Excellent state machine.
server.py:540 LoginResponse contains role='admin' default — frontend gets {token, email, role} unchanged; AdminDashboard works with no other change needed.
server.py:559-622 update_admin_account requires current_password for ANY change, prevents email collision (409), notifies all involved emails on change — security best practices respected.
server.py:472 recovery_email defaults to user['email'] if not yet set — backfill logic at server.py:1247-1251 also handles legacy admins. Robust.

BookingForm.jsx:510-519 stripe-badge vs call-quote logic depends on quote being loaded. Before pickup/dropoff are entered, vq is undefined and StripeBadge renders by default — minor UX nit only (no quote → default badge), not a spec bug since spec says badge replaces ONLY when call-only is detected via priced quote response. Acceptable.
BookingForm.jsx email input pattern '^[^\s@]+@[^\s@]+\.[^\s@]{2,}$' is strict enough to reject 'foo@bar' (no TLD) and 'foo' — verified in browser via element.validity.valid==false.
select.jsx z-[100] and popover.jsx z-[100] properly overlay vehicle cards / neighbor sections. Verified Service Type dropdown computed style zIndex='100'.
AccountTab.jsx form fully wired with all required testids; current_password is required before save (matches backend). UI is consistent with the rest of the admin theme.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Footer/Contact address, email validation, Stripe badge, Service Type/Time z-index, Places autocomplete, Admin 2FA UI, Account tab)

test_credentials: admin@turonlimo.com / TuronAdmin@2025 (2FA bypass for tests: insert into db.admin_2fa_challenges with bcrypt-hashed code '123456' per /app/memory/test_credentials.md)
seed_data_creation: Per-test challenges inserted into db.admin_2fa_challenges (cleaned up by autouse session fixture _cleanup_test_challenges which deletes any challenge older than 2 hours). 1 TEST_ booking + Stripe checkout session were created and deleted within test_booking_post_and_checkout. recovery_email mutation test restores original value in finally block. No persistent test data left in DB other than ephemeral bcrypt challenges (auto-pruned).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 7 spec is fully verified. Note that prior-iteration suites (test_iteration5.py, test_iteration6.py, test_turonlimo_api.py) currently call POST /api/admin/login expecting a {token} response — these will now FAIL since /admin/login returns the 2FA challenge instead. They are NOT regression-clean post-2FA migration. If those suites need to keep passing, their auth_headers fixture should be updated to use the same 2FA bypass pattern as test_iteration7.py::admin_token (insert challenge in db, call verify-2fa). I deliberately did not touch them in this iteration since the iter7 review request only asked to validate the new 2FA / Account / UI work — but main agent should consider updating those fixtures or marking them stale. The iter7 file test_iteration7.py is fully self-contained and uses the documented bypass.
rca of the issue: N/A — all spec items pass without bugs found.
